exam_format: Paper-based or computer-based; Reading, Writing, Listening, Speaking components
exam_price_notes: Price varies by country and test centre. Typically $250-$400 globally.
target_audience: learners who have mastered English to an exceptional level
recommended_experience: Study or work in a very senior professional or academic environment, for example on a postgraduate or PhD programme

prerequisites.description: Study or work in a very senior professional or academic environment, for example on a postgraduate or PhD programme

domains.name: Study demanding subjects at the highest level, including postgraduate and PhD programmes

objectives.title: Understand the main ideas of complex pieces of writing

domains.name: Negotiate and persuade effectively at senior management level in international business settings

official_study_resources.title: Exam preparation
official_study_resources.notes: Comprehensive support with exam preparation and administration
